12-hour (AM/PM) or 24-hour clock. US pro: 12小時制（AM/PM）或24小時制。美國物業通常使用12小時制；歐洲及亞洲物業使用24小時制。
A modern PMS built for speed, clarity, a: 一套專為速度、清晰度與規模設計的現代化PMS——以單一指令驅動平台，統籌前台、訂房、帳務與營運。
Account locks after this many consecutiv: 連續登入失敗幾次後鎖定帳號。PCI-DSS要求最多6次嘗試後鎖定。
Accounts Receivable module coming soon: 應收帳款模組即將上線
Active rules and reusable templates for: Active rules and reusable templates for folio routing.
Adjacent/contiguous rooms are preferred: Adjacent/contiguous rooms are preferred for the group
Advance date without running full audit: Advance date without running full audit
All property events from the last 48 hou: All property events from the last 48 hours
Allows front desk to reassign a room on: 允許前台在抵達當日重新分配客房。初始分配後發生升等或維修變更時使用。
Allows guests to complete check-in via t: 允許賓客在抵達前透過行動應用程式或網路入口完成入住手續，減少尖峰時段前台排隊人潮。
Allows one user to hold multiple roles (: 允許單一使用者擁有多個角色（例如前台＋夜間稽核）。常見於員工身兼多職的小型物業。
API requests per minute per tenant befor: 每個租戶每分鐘的API請求限制（超過後進行節流）。防止失控的整合連線。1000 RPM適合大多數物業。
Are you sure you want to cancel this res: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation? This action cannot be undone.
At least one active rate plan must be co: At least one active rate plan must be configured for the room type before activation.
Automatically creates a housekeeping tas: 賓客退房時自動建立清潔任務。對於當日翻房及客房管理至關重要。
Automatically deactivates users after N: 閒置N天後自動停用帳號，依PCI-DSS 8.1.4規定縮小攻擊面（90天內移除閒置帳號）。
Automatically enrols new guests in the l: 新賓客首次訂房時自動加入忠誠度計畫，無縫增加會員人數。
Automatically posts POS charges (restaur: 自動將POS消費（餐廳、SPA、迷你吧）過帳至賓客帳單。全服務型酒店的標準做法。
Batch check-in all picked reservations w: Batch check-in all picked reservations with proximity-based room assignment
BCP 47 locale tag controlling number gro: BCP 47地區語系標籤，控制數字分組（1,000 vs 1.000）、日期顯示及貨幣符號位置。
Buildings define the physical structures: Buildings define the physical structures in your property.
Bundled offerings with services and add-: 含服務與加購項目的組合方案
限制同時登入的員工數量。季節性員工入職時可增加上限。Opera PMS與Mews均採用使用者數量授權。
Captures explicit marketing consent duri: 在訂房過程中取得明確的行銷同意。依GDPR第7條規定，歐盟物業須遵循。非歐盟物業可選擇不啟用。
Cashier sessions, shift management, and: 收銀班次、輪班管理與備用金核對
Check in guest and assign room: Check in guest and assign room
Check out guest and release room: Check out guest and release room
City ledger, direct billing, and AR agin: 城市帳本、直接帳單與應收帳款帳齡管理
Click cell: edit rate. Right-click: togg: 點擊儲存格：編輯房價。右鍵：切換開放／關閉。
Click to toggle amenities. Add custom on: Click to toggle amenities. Add custom ones below.
Close outgoing session and open incoming: Close outgoing session and open incoming session atomically.
Comma-separated email addresses that rec: 接收晨間營運報表的電子郵件地址（以逗號分隔）。應包含總經理、營收經理及前台經理。
Complete each step to create a booking: Complete each step to create a booking
Create a new group booking to get starte: 請建立新的團體訂房以開始使用。
Create rate plans first, then configure: 請先建立房價方案，再於此設定逐日房價。
Daily cutoff for same-day bookings. Afte: 當日訂房的每日截止時間。超過此時間須訂隔天。與夜間稽核日切時間對齊。
所有畫面的日期顯示格式。MM/DD/YYYY（美國）、DD/MM/YYYY（歐盟/英國）、YYYY-MM-DD（ISO 8601 / 亞洲）。請配合物業的地區設定。
Day-level pricing management across rate: 跨房價方案的逐日定價管理
Days backup snapshots are retained befor: 備份快照自動刪除前的保留天數。最少30天；如有法規或稽核要求可延長。
Days before arrival after which deposits: 抵達前幾天起訂金不予退還。對不可退款房價的營收保護至關重要。
Deadline for guest departure. Industry n: 賓客退房截止時間。行業規範：10:00–12:00。用於晚退費用計算與清潔排程。
Default file format for automated report: 自動報表傳送的預設檔案格式。管理層標準為PDF；財務及營收團隊使用Excel。
Default priority for new maintenance wor: 新維修工單的預設優先級。「一般」為標準；SLA較嚴格的物業可調整為「高」。
Default Redis cache TTL for read-heavy e: 讀取密集端點的預設Redis快取TTL。數值越低資料越新；數值越高資料庫負載越小。300秒為良好平衡點。
Default UI language for staff who haven': 未設定個人偏好的員工的預設介面語言。不影響面向賓客的通訊內容。
Deposit required at time of booking: Deposit required at time of booking
Determines housekeeping queue sort. DUE_: 決定清潔隊列排序。「退房優先」優先處理即將退房的客房以加速翻房——行業最佳實踐。
Determines what this user can access: Determines what this user can access
Discount percentage above which a manage: 超過此折扣比例需要主管核准，防止未授權的房價調整造成營收流失。
Displays the rack (published) rate cross: 在優惠房價旁顯示劃線的公開房價。營收管理中常見的錨定定價技巧。
Electronic lock system in use. Determine: 使用中的電子門鎖系統，決定賓客客房門禁卡的編碼方式。
Enable or disable system commands for yo: 為您的環境啟用或停用系統指令
Enable, disable, and monitor system comm: 啟用、停用及監控系統指令
Enables AI-driven rate adjustment based: 啟用基於需求、競爭對手房價及歷史數據的AI智慧房價調整。需要營收管理模組。
Enables deposit collection at booking. S: 啟用訂房時收取訂金。預付、不可退款及團體訂房的標準做法。
Enables evening turndown service schedul: 啟用晚間開床服務排程。4–5星級物業的標準服務。自動為已住用客房建立夜間清潔任務。
Enables SMS notifications for booking co: 啟用訂房確認、入住提醒及服務請求的簡訊通知，需要有效的簡訊服務供應商。
End-of-day processing, trial balance, an: 日結處理、試算表與營收過帳
Enforces two-factor authentication for a: 對所有員工強制執行雙因素驗證。依PCI-DSS及GDPR強烈建議。整合POS終端機的必要設定。
exists. Express checkout will attempt to: exists. Express checkout will attempt to resolve the folio automatically.
Express checkout: resolve folio, close,: Express checkout: resolve folio, close, release room
First day of week in calendars and date: 日曆及日期選擇器的每週起始日。星期日（美洲）或星期一（歐洲、亞洲）。影響房價日曆格線對齊。
Fixed per-night city/tourist tax in base: 以本位幣計算的固定每晚城市／觀光稅。許多地區要求在帳單上單獨列項。
Folio is settled. Express checkout will: Folio is settled. Express checkout will close the folio and release the room.
Folios, charges, payments, and invoice m: 帳戶、費用、付款與發票管理
Forces new users to verify email before: 要求新使用者在首次登入前驗證電子郵件，防止錯字域名攻擊帳號。符合HTNG身分驗證最佳實踐。
Forces password reset every N days. Set: 強制每N天重設密碼。設為0表示永不過期（NIST 800-63B現建議除非遭入侵否則不強制輪換）。
Group blocks, room allocations, and room: 團體房塊、客房分配與住房名單
Guest profiles will appear here once the: 賓客資料建立後將顯示於此。
Guest profiles, preferences, and loyalty: 賓客資料、偏好及忠誠度記錄
Guest will be auto-enrolled in loyalty p: Guest will be auto-enrolled in loyalty program
Hours before an unresolved work order is: 未解決工單升級至主管前的等待小時數。影響賓客的維修項目應設定較短數值。
Hours before arrival within which cancel: 抵達前多少小時內可免費取消。行業規範：24–72小時。縮短時間窗口可加強營收保護。
Housekeeping status assigned when a gues: 賓客退房時指派的清潔狀態。「待清潔」觸發自動建立清潔任務；「已檢查」跳過清潔程序。
How often full database snapshots are ta: 完整資料庫快照的頻率。每日為標準；高交易量物業建議每小時。RPO應符合業務需求。
How often stayover rooms are scheduled f: 續住客房的清潔排程頻率。每日（1天）是豪華標準；每2–3天可降低經濟型物業成本。
HTTPS URL to property logo. Used on regi: 物業標誌的HTTPS網址。用於住宿登記卡、帳單、電子郵件及賓客入口網站標頭。
IANA timezone for all date/time calculat: 所有日期/時間計算使用的IANA時區。對於夜間稽核切換、入退房時間及房價日曆顯示至關重要。
Include country code (e.g. +1 for US, +4: Include country code (e.g. +1 for US, +44 for UK)
Individual bookings, check-ins, check-ou: 個人訂房、入住、退房及賓客住宿
ISO 4217 code for all financial transact: 所有財務交易使用的ISO 4217幣別代碼。營運中途變更須完整重新核對營收——上線時請正確設定。
JSON schema defining extra fields on the: 定義賓客資料額外欄位的JSON結構描述。用於特定國家要求，如稅務編號、護照號碼或簽證資訊。
定義訂房表單額外欄位的JSON結構描述。用於物業特定資料，如忠誠度等級、團體代碼或特殊需求。
Language used in guest-facing emails, re: 賓客電子郵件、住宿登記卡及收據使用的語言。應配合主要賓客群體的語言。
Late checkout fees above this amount nee: 超過此金額的晚退費用需主管核准，確保高額晚退服務獲得適當授權。
Leave blank to let the API calculate the: Leave blank to let the API calculate the fee from checkout policy.
Leave blank to let the API use the rate: Leave blank to let the API use the rate plan penalty or room rate fallback.
Leave blank to use the reservation room: Leave blank to use the reservation room rate.
Leave empty for best available floor: Leave empty for best available floor
Leave empty for no end date: Leave empty for no end date
Limits simultaneous logins per user. Pre: 限制每位使用者同時登入數。防止帳號共用。設為0表示無限制（不建議）。
夜間稽核日切的本地時間。行業標準：23:00–02:00。須在最後一筆入住之後、第一筆早晨退房之前。
閒置N分鐘後自動登出。PCI-DSS規定付款終端機須15分鐘；PMS工作站標準為30分鐘。
Makes phone number mandatory in the book: 在訂房流程中將電話號碼設為必填。需要簡訊確認或電話確認的物業必須啟用。
Manage bookings, check-ins, check-outs,: 管理訂房、入住、退房及賓客住宿
Manage group blocks, room allocations, a: 管理團體房塊、客房分配與住房名單
Mark room as Out of Order: Mark room as Out of Order
Maximum consecutive Do-Not-Disturb days: 連續請勿打擾天數上限，超過後通知主管。健康安全法規通常要求48–72小時內進入客房。
Maximum database connections per service: 每個服務實例的最大資料庫連線數。高交易量物業可增加；預設10個連線可處理約500名同時上線使用者。
賓客可提前訂房的最長天數。365天為標準；提前2年以上預訂的團體／活動型物業可增加上限。
Maximum discount agents can apply withou: 服務人員可自行套用的最大折扣，超過需主管授權。防止未授權的大幅折扣。Opera稱為「最大允許折扣」。
員工密碼的最少字元數。NIST 800-63B建議至少8位；PCI-DSS要求7位以上。
Minimum hours of lead time for online bo: 線上訂房的最短提前時數，防止清潔人員無法及時準備的臨時訂房。
Minimum length-of-stay restriction pushe: 推送至OTA渠道的最短住宿天數限制，有助於保護短期住宿的直接訂房。
Minutes between OTA inventory pushes. Lo: OTA庫存推送間隔分鐘數。數值越低，超賣風險越小但API費用越高。15–60分鐘為標準。
mode and is not yet available for bookin: mode and is not yet available for booking.
mode to reconfigure rate plans or room t: mode to reconfigure rate plans or room type settings.
Months after last stay before guest Pers: 上次住宿後幾個月對賓客個人識別資訊進行匿名化處理。GDPR要求資料最小化原則。
Name: Name
Night Audit module coming soon: 夜間稽核模組即將上線

No activity recorded in the last 48 hour: No activity recorded in the last 48 hours

no BAR rate defined: 尚未定義最佳可用房價
No commission data for the selected peri: No commission data for the selected period.

No trial balance data for this date: No trial balance data for this date
No users found. Invite your first team m: No users found. Invite your first team member to get started.
No users match your search or filter.
Official hotel classification (1–5 stars: 官方旅館星級評定（1–5星）。影響OTA上架等級、賓客期望與公開房價定位。
Operational reports, analytics, and data: 營運報表、分析與資料匯出
Packages and add-ons will appear here on: 套裝及加購項目建立後將顯示於此。
Percentage markup/markdown on rates sent: 發送至渠道管理商的房價加減幅百分比。正值＝加價，負值＝相對直訂房價的折扣。
Percentage of booking total charged for: 未到店時收取的訂房總額百分比。100%（第一晚全額）為行業標準，部分物業採用50%。
Percentage of total booking collected as: 訂金佔訂房總額的百分比。行業範圍：10–50%。團體通常要求25–50%。
Post a cancellation penalty to the reser: Post a cancellation penalty to the reservation folio
Post a charge to a folio: Post a charge to a folio
Post a late checkout fee without checkin: Post a late checkout fee without checking the guest out
Post a no-show penalty to the reservatio: Post a no-show penalty to the reservation folio
Preferred MFA delivery method. TOTP (aut: 偏好的多因素驗證傳送方式。TOTP（驗證器應用程式）最為安全；簡訊方便但易受SIM卡調換攻擊。
Prevents new check-ins while night audit: 夜間稽核處理期間禁止新的入住操作，避免跨日期交易造成的過帳錯誤。
Primary HEX colour (#RRGGBB) applied to: 主要HEX色碼（#RRGGBB），套用於賓客通訊、PDF帳單及PMS側邊欄強調色。
Property configuration, user preferences: 物業設定、使用者偏好與系統配置
Property structures, wings, and floor pl: 物業建築、翼樓與平面圖
Rate plans will appear here once they ar: 房價方案建立後將顯示於此。
Rate plans, pricing strategies, and seas: 房價方案、定價策略與季節性調整
Real-time overview of property operation: 即時查看物業營運狀況與關鍵指標
Redacts guest PII (email, phone, payment: 從所有應用程式日誌中遮蔽賓客個人識別資訊（電子郵件、電話、付款卡）。符合PCI-DSS及GDPR合規要求。
Refund amounts exceeding this value (bas: 退款金額超過此值（本位幣）需主管簽核，防止詐欺性退款。
Reply-to address for guest emails. Use a: 賓客電子郵件的回覆地址。請使用有人管理的收件匣（如reservations@hotel.com），避免使用noreply，以改善賓客溝通。
Requires at least one digit. Standard pr: 要求至少一個數字。依PCI-DSS規定與大寫字母要求並列的標準做法。
要求至少一個大寫字母。屬於大多數PMS安全框架建議的密碼複雜度規則。
Requires manager approval to mark a room: 將客房標記為停用維修需要主管核准，防止未經授權的維修封鎖造成庫存損失。
Reservations will appear here once they: 訂房建立後將顯示於此。
Reservations without sufficient deposits: Reservations without sufficient deposits will be skipped
Reset to the default temporary password: Reset to the default temporary password
Role auto-assigned to new users. Best pr: 自動指派給新使用者的角色。最佳實踐：使用最低權限角色（前台），僅在必要時提升權限。
Role required to approve balance write-o: 核准餘額核銷所需的角色。應為總經理或以上職級，防止隱性營收損失。
Role that must approve complimentary (fr: 需核准免費住宿夜晚的角色。最佳實踐：要求總經理或營收經理核准。
Room categories, configurations, and ame: 房間類別、配置與設施套組
Room cleaning schedules, task assignment: 客房清潔排程、任務分配與檢查
Room inventory, status tracking, and ass: 客房庫存、狀態追蹤與分配
Room types define the categories of room: Room types define the categories of rooms in your property.
Rooms released after this date: 超過此日期後釋出客房
Rooms will appear here once they are con: 客房設定後將顯示於此。
Rooms will be assigned on the same floor: Rooms will be assigned on the same floor when possible
Rounding rule for nightly rate calculati: 夜間房價計算的進位規則。四捨五入是會計標準；無條件捨去對賓客較有利。
Run night audit for this date?: Run night audit for this date?
Runs night audit automatically at the sc: 在排定時間自動執行夜間稽核，減少手動步驟。若物業需要稽核前檢查，請停用此功能。
Search by name, code, or location…: 依名稱、代碼或地點搜尋…
依姓名、電子郵件、電話搜尋...
Search invoice number, guest, confirmati: Search invoice number, guest, confirmation, type, status...
Select a room to assign, or let the syst: Select a room to assign, or let the system auto-assign the best available room.
外發電子郵件的寄件人顯示名稱。應使用物業名稱（例如「Tartware大飯店」）以提升品牌識別度。
Showing live invoice states from billing: Showing live invoice states from billing APIs.
Shows AI-generated revenue projections o: 在儀表板上顯示AI生成的營收預測，依據訂房速度、季節性及歷史績效分析。
Sign in to your account to continue: 請登入帳號以繼續使用
Standard time rooms become available. In: 客房標準供應時間。行業規範：14:00–16:00。顯示於訂房確認單與賓客應用程式。
Start typing to search by name or addres: Start typing to search by name or address
Subject: Subject
System picks the best available room: System picks the best available room
Target resolution time for normal-priori: 一般優先級維修的目標處理時間。行業規範：影響賓客者4小時，非緊急項目24小時。
Tasks are created automatically when roo: 任務將於退房時自動建立，或由員工手動指派。
Tax Configuration module coming soon: 稅務設定模組即將上線
Tax rules, jurisdictions, and rate confi: 稅務規則、管轄區與稅率設定
The room will be removed from booking av: The room will be removed from booking availability.
Third-party SMS gateway. Twilio is the m: 第三方簡訊閘道。Twilio最為常見。請依物業賓客主要來源市場的覆蓋範圍選擇。
This booking requires a guest with a pho: This booking requires a guest with a phone number on file.
This posts a no-show penalty to the rese: This posts a no-show penalty to the reservation folio. If the reservation is still confirmed, the billing command will also mark it as
This posts a penalty to the folio for a: This posts a penalty to the folio for a reservation already marked
This posts the fee only. It does not che: This posts the fee only. It does not check the guest out or release the room.
This will batch check-in all picked rese: This will batch check-in all picked reservations in this group with proximity-based room assignment.
This will resolve the folio, close it, m: This will resolve the folio, close it, mark checkout, and set the room to dirty.
Time housekeeping shift begins and the c: 清潔班次開始及清潔隊列啟動的時間。標準：08:00。與退房時間加緩衝時間對齊。
Title: Title
Transactional email service for booking: 用於訂房確認、帳單及通知的交易型電子郵件服務。自行託管使用SMTP；雲端傳送使用SendGrid/SES。
Triggers a staff alert when occupancy fa: 住房率低於此百分比時觸發員工警示，促進主動式營收管理與促銷行動。
請輸入使用者名稱與密碼。
When available rooms drop to this count,: 當可用客房數降至此數量時，自動封鎖OTA訂房，為直接訂房／現場入住保留最後客房。
When enabled, cleaned rooms must pass su: 啟用後，已清潔客房須通過主管驗房才能更改狀態為「已清潔」。Forbes五星級品牌的必要要求。
When enabled, front desk can offer early: 啟用後，前台可直接提供提早入住服務無需申請核准。清潔排程緊湊的物業建議停用。
Whether published rates already include: 公開房價是否已含稅。歐洲常見含稅（含VAT）；北美通常顯示未稅房價。
Years before completed reservations are: 已完成訂房的歸檔年限。法規要求各異：稅務7年，信用卡爭議3年。
